log.context:
All fixed and pushed. Here's the summary:

**Root cause:** 7 persona YAML files in `bigclungus-meta/agents/` were missing `avatar_url` in their frontmatter (or had it set to `''`), even though avatar files exist on disk. The congress UI bakes the roster into the session JSON at start time, so those empty values froze into the snapshot — making avatars permanently absent for historical sessions.

**Personas fixed:**
| Persona | File assigned |
|---|---|
| hasan | `hasan.gif` |
| hume | `hume.gif`...(truncated)
